products.description: TapeTech has now included a new Accessory Kit with every Wash Station purchased. The kit includes: a. Hanging Basket – to keep your already cleaned tools clean and allows them to hang to dry. Features: Hanging Basket – Allows your already clean tools to stay clean and not be put back into the basin with other tools. The basket allows for the tools to begin drying while hanging. Drain Riser – The drain riser is inserted into the metal drain in the basin and helps to prevent compound from draining into the bucket, keeping your water cleaner longer. products.description: Locking Wheel Kit for Mobile Wash Station This high-performance locking wheel kit will enhance your mobile wash station by offering secure positioning and easy mobility. This kit comes with four sturdy caster wheels, two of which have locking mechanisms to keep your wash station steady while in use, making it ideal for commercial or portable cleaning setups. Features: • Smooth Maneuverability: Swivel casters make it simple to move on a variety of surfaces, such as asphalt, tile, and concrete. • Dependable Braking System: The station is securely held in place by two wheels that are fitted with easy-use locks. • Sturdy Construction: Made from industrial-grade steel and rubber for long-lasting performance under heavy loads and damp conditions.
products.name: Locking Wheel Kit for Mobile Wash Station

products.description: Contains one each of the 5″ and 6″ margin trowels. These are ideal for applying and smoothing stucco and EIFS materials in small areas where traditional trowels do not fit. The high carbon tempered steel blade provides enhanced toughness, durability and performance compared to standard high carbon trowels. Features the TapeTech ProSoft grip for all-day comfort and reduced fatigue.
products.name: 5" and 6" Margin Trowel Set

products.description: TapeTech drywall joint compound rollers are ideal for applying large amounts of drywall compound on walls and ceilings for finishing large patches and butt joints, or skimming entire walls, ceilings and rooms. They are a great alternative to breaking out a sprayer or trying to apply the compound with knives or trowels. Simply apply the joint compound with the TapeTech premium drywall joint compound roller and then skim the area with a TapeTech premium finishing knife for an amazing finish. The 2″ compound roller is perfect for applying joint compound to internal corners prior to using a corner flusher or finisher. This roller includes a specially designed extended roller frame; the roller is not replaceable. Key Features: Highest Quality: TapeTech premium drywall joint compound rollers are manufactured in Europe exclusively for TapeTech, using the highest quality reticulated polypropylene nap for great results and long life. Highest Capacity : TapeTech premium drywall joint compound rollers feature an 18mm nap – nearly 50% thicker than other brands with ½” nap – allowing you to apply nearly 50% more compound to the surface between fills compared to other high nap rollers. Highest Coverage: The unique design and manufacturing of TapeTech premium joint compound rollers releases more compound from the nap and onto the surface, providing the highest coverage rate per roller load. Robust Frame Design: TapeTech premium drywall joint compound rollers are designed for use with TapeTech roller frames. Our frames are a full 5/16” thick – stronger than smaller ¼” thick frames on the market. Comfortable Handle: The TapeTech Roller frames feature a comfortable, two-component over molded handle that provides comfortable handling and positive grip, even when wet. Ideal for Skimming: The TapeTech premium drywall joint compound rollers are ideal for quickly applying large amounts of compound over patches, butt joints or entire surfaces. The perfect set up for skimming with TapeTech premium finishing knives.
products.name: 2" Premium Inside Corner Compound Roller with Frame

products.description: TapeTech premium curved drywall trowels allow you to professionally feather and taper drywall, EIFS and stucco joints, leaving extra joint compound where you need it most – over butt joints and uneven adjacent gypsum or EPS panels. The triple-hardened stainless steel blades ensure maximum performance, and the ProSoft handle is slip-resistant and comfortable to reduce user fatigue.
products.name: 12" x 4.7" Premium Gold Stainless Steel Curved Finishing Trowel

products.description: The TapeTech EasyRoll® Adjustable Corner Finisher is used to perfectly feather both joint compound edges of internal corners in one pass. The Corner Finishers can be used for wall-to-wall internal corners or wall-to-ceiling corners. The “adjustable” feature of this tool refers to the ability to control the amount of spring pressure by engaging or disengaging one set of tension springs on the back of the corner finisher. Corner Finishers, also referred to as Angle Finishers or Angle Heads, are attached to a corner applicator (CA07TT or CA08TT) or the 14TT MudRunner® to quickly and professionally finish internal drywall corners. EasyRoll® Adjustable Corner Finishers have wheels to provide the smoothest action on the wall and are spring loaded to help compensate for slightly imperfect corners. Use with the FHTT Fiberglass Handle or the XHTT Extension Handle – not included. Wipes down excess mud in internal corners Finishes inside corners of walls and ceilings
products.name: 3-1/2" EasyRoll® Adjustable Corner Finisher
